error_signature: parsing as type timestamp: unexpected separator ‘"’ for field Year
title: Timestamp parsing error in PostgreSQL Insert node
symptom: When using the PostgreSQL Insert node with an ISO 8601 date string, an error occurs indicating an unexpected separator for the field Year.
applies_when: Input date is in ISO 8601 format
not_this_if: Using standard PostgreSQL database instead of CockroachDB
root_cause: CockroachDB, while compatible with PostgreSQL, has stricter timestamp parsing rules. The error arises because the input date string starts with a double quote, which is not expected by CockroachDB's parser.
fix_steps: Switch to using the execute statement operation in n8n
Explicitly cast the required types in your SQL statement
agent_instruction: Use the execute statement operation and ensure to cast the timestamp types explicitly.
